logoutConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to log out?

landingPage.welcome: Track check-ins and check-outs with role-based access

registerPage.title: Register
registerPage.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

attendancePage.title: Attendance
attendancePage.openCheckInWarning: You have an open check-in from a previous day. Please check out first.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.message: You are not allowed to access this resource.

notFound.title: Not Found
notFound.message: The requested resource was not found.

serviceUnavailable.title: Service Unavailable
serviceUnavailable.message: Sorry, our service is currently unavailable, please try again later.

network.title: Connection Error
network.message: Please check your internet connection and try again.

invalidEmail.title: Invalid Email
invalidEmail.message: Please enter a valid email address.

userDisabled.title: Account Disabled
userDisabled.message: This account has been disabled. Contact support for help.

userNotFound.title: Account Not Found
userNotFound.message: No account exists with this email address.

invalidCredential.title: Login Failed
invalidCredential.message: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

emailAlreadyInUse.title: Email In Use
emailAlreadyInUse.message: An account with this email already exists.

operationNotAllowed.title: Sign-in Unavailable
operationNotAllowed.message: Email/password sign-in is not enabled. Contact support.

weakPassword.title: Weak Password
weakPassword.message: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.

tooManyRequests.title: Too Many Attempts
tooManyRequests.message: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.

default.title: Authentication Error
default.message: Could not complete authentication. Please try again.

default.title: Database Error
default.message: Could not complete the request. Please try again.

default.title: Upload Error
default.message: Could not upload the file. Please try again.

servicesDisabled.title: Location Is Off
servicesDisabled.message: Turn on location services to check in or check out.

permissionDenied.title: Location Permission Required
permissionDenied.message: Allow location access while using the app to record attendance.

permissionPermanentlyDenied.title: Location Permission Blocked
permissionPermanentlyDenied.message: Enable location permission for this app in Settings to record attendance.

alreadyCheckedIn.title: Already Checked In
alreadyCheckedIn.message: Please check out before checking in again.

notCheckedIn.title: Not Checked In
notCheckedIn.message: You need to check in before you can check out.

alreadyCheckedInToday.title: Check-in Complete
alreadyCheckedInToday.message: You have already checked in today.

alreadyCheckedOutToday.title: Check-out Complete
alreadyCheckedOutToday.message: You have already checked out today.
